posts.raw_content:
In the opening of Thomas' dissent: "Blacks were entitled to citizenship because they were Americans. They had no other homeland, owed no allegiance to any foreign power, and were subject to no other
authority."

Case closed.

Unbelievable betrayal.

This may very well go down in history as the beginning of the end.

You know that as soon as a democrat steals the next election after Trump fails to pass voter ID, then they will immediately open the border to every 3rd world-er on God's green earth and this country will be done.

We will fall like Rome just like that and the history books won't clearly be able to articulate the exact reason why, but we will all know it.
